benefits: 35% capital subsidy on projects costing up to Rs 2 lakh. Low interest rate loans.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Resident of a rural area. Unemployed youth aged 18 to 40 years. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 2 lakh.

scheme_name: Punjab Interest Subsidy for SC/ST Startups
description: Interest subvention scheme for entrepreneurs from SC/ST communities in Punjab.
benefits: Interest subsidy of 5% on term loans for setting up new micro/small industrial enterprises.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Belongs to SC or ST category. Age 18 years or above. DPIIT recognized startup or new enterprise. No income limit.

description: Travel subsidy for students from remote villages to attend colleges in Punjab.
benefits: Monthly reimbursement of 75% of travel expenses or Rs 500 per month.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Student studying in a government college. Resides in a village with no direct college access. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 2.5 lakh.

scheme_name: Punjab Free Coaching Scheme for IAS/PCS Exams
description: Free coaching program for civil services aspirants from weaker sections in Punjab.
benefits: Free classroom coaching, study materials, and library facilities. Monthly stipend of Rs 3,000.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Belongs to SC/ST, OBC, or EWS category. Minimum graduate degree. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 3 lakh. Admission through entrance test.

description: Subsidies for setting up food processing and sorting units by farmers in Punjab.
benefits: Subsidy of 40% on plant machinery up to a maximum of Rs 10 lakh.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Occupation must be farmer or Farmer Producer Organization (FPO). Age 18 years or above. No income limit.

scheme_name: Punjab Dairy Farming Training for Rural Youth
description: Skill development in modern dairy farming for rural youth of Punjab.
benefits: Free 2-week to 4-week training. Rs 1,000 stipend. Certificate eligible for bank loan subsidies.
eligibility_text: Resident of rural Punjab. Age 18 to 35 years. Minimum 8th class pass. No income restriction.

scheme_name: Punjab Assistance for Construction of Toilets in Rural Areas
description: Financial grant under Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) in Punjab.
benefits: Financial assistance of Rs 12,000 for constructing a twin-pit toilet.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Resides in a rural area. Does not own a toilet. Household must be BPL or marginal landholding SC/ST.

description: Subsidized foodgrains under the National Food Security Act in Punjab.
benefits: Wheat at Rs 2 per kg and additional items like pulses and oil at highly subsidized rates.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Belongs to BPL, Priority Household (PHH), or Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) category.

scheme_name: Punjab Financial Assistance to Non-Pensioner Freedom Fighters
description: Monthly financial aid to recognized freedom fighters or their widows in Punjab.
benefits: Monthly assistance of Rs 10,000. Free medical aid and state bus transport pass.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Punjab. Recognized by Punjab government as a freedom fighter or family dependent. Must not receive central pension.

scheme_name: Punjab Sports Promotion Incentive Scheme for Rural Youth
description: Incentives to encourage rural youth to participate in state and national level sports in Punjab.
benefits: Free sports kits, training equipment, and dietary allowance of Rs 250 per day during camps.
eligibility_text: Resident of rural Punjab. Age 10 to 25 years. Active member of local village sports club. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Vyapari Kshatipurti Bima Yojana
description: Insurance scheme for small and medium traders of Haryana in case of loss of property due to fire, theft, or natural calamity.
benefits: Compensation coverage from Rs 5 lakh up to Rs 25 lakh based on registration and turnover category. Premium paid by the state government.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Registered small or medium trader under GST and Haryana Trader Welfare Board. Annual turnover not exceeding Rs 1.50 crore.

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Parivar Samridhi Yojana (MMPSY) - Premium Waiver
description: Social security premium support for eligible families of Haryana.
benefits: Direct payment of premiums for PM-JBY, PM-SBY, and PM-KMY by the state government, plus cash support. Total benefits up to Rs 6,000/year.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Registered under Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP). Annual family income not exceeding Rs 1.80 lakh. Cultivable landholding under 2 hectares.

scheme_name: Haryana Pashu Kisan Credit Card (PKCC) Scheme
description: Credit card scheme for livestock owners in Haryana to buy fodder, feed, and manage livestock expenses.
benefits: Credit limit up to Rs 3 lakh. Collateral free up to Rs 1.6 lakh. Interest rate of 4% per annum.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Must own dairy animals (cow, buffalo, sheep, goat, or poultry). No income limit. Bank account and PPP details required.

description: Subsidized solar water pumping system for farmers in Haryana under PM-KUSUM.
benefits: Subsidy of 75% on solar water pumps of 3 HP to 10 HP. Installation of pump and solar panels.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Occupation must be farmer. Must own cultivable land. Must not have utility grid connection for irrigation pump. Water saving commitment required.

scheme_name: Haryana One-time Settlement Scheme (Kar Samadhan Yojana)
description: Settlement of pending tax disputes for businesses in Haryana.
benefits: Waiver of 100% penal interest and penalties for pre-GST tax disputes on payment of core tax.
eligibility_text: Registered business in Haryana. Pending disputes under VAT, Central Sales Tax, or Luxury Tax. No income limit.

description: Financial assistance loans for self-employment of Scheduled Caste persons in Haryana.
benefits: Loan up to Rs 2 lakh with 25% subsidy element and interest rate of 4-6% per annum.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Belongs to SC community. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 1.50 lakh. Age 18 to 55 years.

scheme_name: Haryana Chief Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Meritorious Girls
description: Financial scholarship to encourage higher education among girl students in Haryana.
benefits: Scholarship of Rs 1,000 to Rs 3,000 per month depending on degree and course level.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Female student enrolled in a government college or university. Scored 60% or above in qualifying exams. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 2.50 lakh.

scheme_name: Haryana Free Tablets for Government School Students (E-Adhigam)
description: Distribution of free tablets with pre-loaded learning content and free data to school students in Haryana.
benefits: Free Android tablet device with 2 GB free internet data per day for educational purposes.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Student enrolled in a government school in Class 10, 11, or 12. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Vivah Shadi Shagun Yojana (General/OBC BPL)
description: Financial assistance for the marriage of daughters of General and OBC BPL families in Haryana.
benefits: One-time cash incentive of Rs 31,000 paid to the family of the bride. Rs 28,000 given before marriage, balance on submission of certificate.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Belongs to General or OBC category. Registered under PPP. Must possess BPL ration card. Daughter age 18 years or above.

scheme_name: Haryana State Merit Scholarship for College Students
description: Merit scholarship for top-performing college students in Haryana.
benefits: Rs 3,000 to Rs 5,000 per annum for undergraduate and postgraduate courses.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Pursuing higher education in Haryana government colleges. Position in top merit list of university. No income restriction.

scheme_name: Haryana Post-Matric Scholarship for EWS Students
description: Scholarship for Economically Weaker Section students pursuing post-matric courses in Haryana.
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver and maintenance allowance up to Rs 1,200 per month.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Belongs to EWS category. Studying in recognized post-matric institution. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 2.50 lakh.

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Bal Seva Yojana (Orphan Support)
description: Financial support to children who lost their parents due to COVID-19 or other circumstances in Haryana.
benefits: Monthly assistance of Rs 2,500 per child until age 18. Additional Rs 12,000 per year for education. Free schooling.
eligibility_text: Orphaned children residing in Haryana state. Loss of both parents or surviving single parent. Age below 18 years.

scheme_name: Haryana Nirguni Bhajan Mandli Incentive Scheme
description: Grants to traditional music groups promoting folk culture in Haryana.
benefits: Annual grant of Rs 10,000 for instruments and uniform purchase. Free travel passes for performances.
eligibility_text: Registered Bhajan Mandli (folk group) in Haryana. At least 5 active members. Resident of Haryana. Recommended by District Public Relations Officer.

description: Monthly financial assistance to Kashmiri migrant families registered in Haryana.
benefits: Rs 1,250 per member of family, maximum of Rs 5,000 per family per month.
eligibility_text: Kashmiri migrant family registered with Haryana Relief Commissioner. Temporary or permanent resident of Haryana. BPL status preferred.

scheme_name: Haryana Pension Scheme for Press Media Personnel
description: Monthly pension for veteran journalists of Haryana.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 10,000 for life. Free medical facilities under Haryana health scheme.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Age 60 years or above. At least 20 years of active journalism service. Recognized by Directorate of Information and Public Relations.

description: Monthly financial aid to dwarf citizens of Haryana state.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 2,750 directly deposited to bank account.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Height of male must be 3 feet 8 inches or less; female must be 3 feet 3 inches or less. Age 18 years or above. Certified by civil surgeon.

description: Monthly pension support for third gender/eunuch community in Haryana.
benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 2,750 directly deposited to bank account.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Belongs to transgender/eunuch community. Age 18 years or above. Medical certificate required from government medical board.

description: Financial assistance to pregnant women working in unorganized sector of Haryana.
benefits: One-time financial assistance of Rs 5,000 in two installments for nutrition and healthcare.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Pregnant woman. Occupation must be unorganized worker or agriculture labour. Registered under Haryana Labour Welfare Board. Annual family income under Rs 1.80 lakh.

scheme_name: Haryana Sports Talent Search Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarships to encourage young sportspersons in government schools of Haryana.
benefits: Monthly scholarship of Rs 1,000 to Rs 2,000 based on sports level (District/State/National).
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Student in government school. Age 8 to 18 years. Participated in recognized district or state tournaments.

scheme_name: Haryana Cash Incentive Scheme for National/International Athletes
description: Incentive prizes for sportspersons winning medals in national or international events representing Haryana.
benefits: Gold medal Olympic: Rs 6 crore. Silver: Rs 4 crore. Bronze: Rs 2.5 crore. National gold: Rs 5 lakh.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Sportsperson representing Haryana or India. No income limit. Certified by Sports Authority of India/Haryana.

description: Providing subsidized seed treatment chemicals to prevent crop diseases in Haryana.
benefits: 50% subsidy on purchase of recommended fungicides/insecticides for seed treatment.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Occupation must be farmer. Registered on Meri Fasal Mera Byora (MFMB) portal. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana Promotion of Agro-Forestry on Farm Bunds
description: Financial assistance to plant poplars or eucalyptus trees on farm boundaries in Haryana.
benefits: Cash subsidy of Rs 10 per surviving tree per year for 3 years.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Occupation must be farmer. Planting trees on agricultural land boundaries. No income restriction.

scheme_name: Haryana Subsidy for Setting up Bio-Gas Plants
description: Financial support for constructing domestic bio-gas plants in rural Haryana.
benefits: Subsidy of up to Rs 14,000 for general category and Rs 22,000 for SC category per plant.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Resides in a rural area. Must own domestic cattle (cow/buffalo) for dung supply. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana Cooperative Bank Self-Employment Loan Scheme
description: Concessional loans for self-employment ventures through District Central Cooperative Banks in Haryana.
benefits: Loan up to Rs 3 lakh with 3% interest subvention for timely repayment.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Age 18 to 50 years. Registered under PPP. Unemployed. No income limit.

description: Providing affordable residential plots or flats to urban poor families in Haryana.
benefits: Allotment of 1-marla plot or 2-room flat at highly subsidized prices. Interest subsidy on housing loan.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Registered under PPP. Resident of urban area. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 1.80 lakh. Must not own a pucca house in Haryana.

scheme_name: Haryana Free Coaching Scheme for Civil Services (Super 100)
description: Coaching and boarding facilities for high-performing government school students in Haryana.
benefits: Free residential coaching for IIT-JEE/NEET and Civil Services exams. Free hostel and food.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Enrolled in a government school. Scored 80% or above in Class 10. Selected through state talent search exam. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana Financial Assistance for Higher Education of BOCW Workers' Children
description: Grants for children of registered construction workers pursuing professional degrees in Haryana.
benefits: Annual grant of Rs 20,000 for regular courses, Rs 50,000 for professional courses (MBBS/B.Tech). Additional hostel allowance of Rs 10,000.
eligibility_text: Child of worker registered under Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. Parent must have 1 year registration. Children must be enrolled in recognized institutions.

description: Financial assistance to purchase cycles for registered construction workers in Haryana.
benefits: One-time subsidy of Rs 3,000 or actual cost of cycle, whichever is lower.
eligibility_text: Worker registered under Haryana BOCW Board for at least 1 year. Occupation construction/building worker. Registered under PPP. No income limit.

scheme_name: Haryana BOCW Tool Purchase Subsidy Scheme
description: Providing subsidy to buy professional tools for registered workers in Haryana.
benefits: Subsidy of Rs 5,000 to purchase trade tools (masonry, carpentry, electric, plumbing).
eligibility_text: Worker registered under Haryana BOCW Welfare Board. At least 1 year registration. Occupation building/construction worker. No income restriction.

scheme_name: Haryana BOCW Medical Assistance for Chronic Diseases
description: Financial aid for treatments of chronic illnesses of registered workers and their families in Haryana.
benefits: Financial assistance up to Rs 1 lakh for treatments of cancer, kidney failure, heart surgeries.
eligibility_text: Registered worker under Haryana BOCW Board with active membership. For self and family dependants. Certified by government hospital medical board.

description: Distribution of motorized tricycles/scooters to physically disabled persons in Haryana.
benefits: Free motorized tricycle or retrofit scooter. Training and licensing assistance.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Lower limb disability of 60% or more. Age 18 to 45 years. Annual family income not exceeding Rs 2 lakh. Student or self-employed person.

scheme_name: Haryana Apni Beti Apna Dhan (EWS Deposit Scheme)
description: Social welfare deposit scheme to promote education and postpone marriage of girls in Haryana.
benefits: Rs 21,000 accumulated sum paid to the girl child when she attains 18 years of age and is unmarried.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Belongs to SC/ST or Economically Weaker Section (EWS). Registered under PPP. Girl age below 1 year at registration.

scheme_name: Haryana State Transport Free Travel Passes for Students
description: Free travel passes on state transport buses for student commuters in Haryana.
benefits: Free bus pass for daily commute up to 60 km from residence to educational institution.
eligibility_text: Permanent resident of Haryana. Enrolled as a regular student in a recognized school, college, or university in Haryana. No income limit.
